name: Jimbo — AI Orchestrator
description: Master dispatcher. Routes tasks to specialist agents, manages shared memory, and runs 22 autonomous missions overnight without supervision.

name: Inbox Agent
description: Email automation engine. Classifies inquiries, drafts responses in Andrew's voice, and generates a morning action brief with ranked leads.

name: Lead Score Agent
description: Scores every lead across 13 weighted signals. Surfaces hot prospects before manual triage begins.

name: Design Request Pipeline
description: End-to-end design intake. Parses briefs from email, builds structured Notion DR pages, links Drive assets.

name: Post-Event Pipeline
description: Runs automatically after every event. Downloads media, updates Drive, sets gallery links, drafts thank-you email.

name: SEO Agent
description: Monitors keyword rankings and competitor movement for MIGHTY Photo Booths. Dashboard at port 8329.

name: Competitor Intel Engine
description: Passive OSINT on local photo booth competitors. Tracks pricing, social velocity, venue relationships, and GBP signals.

name: Snappic Microsite Builder
description: Generates per-event custom CSS for the Snappic guest gallery. Matches the event design package automatically.

name: W9 Generator
description: Generates pre-filled W9 request packages for vendors and subcontractors. Files to Drive.

name: Morning Brief
description: Daily 06:00 report: leads ranked by score, overdue tasks, upcoming events, Snappic anomalies, and one priority action.

name: Event Details Builder
description: Builds fully-structured Notion Event Details pages from CRM data — timeline, venue, equipment, design brief, staff.

name: Blog Agent
description: Researches, writes, and formats SEO articles for the photo booth industry. Generates cover images. Publishes on schedule.
